results.title: Mob Excess Deterrent Using Silent Audio or MEDUSA
excerpts: Mob Excess Deterrent Using Silent Audio or MEDUSA

results.title: MEDUSA (weapon) | Military Wiki | Fandom
excerpts: MEDUSA (Mob Excess Deterrent Using Silent Audio) is a directional, non-lethal weapon designed for crowd control and exploiting the microwave auditory effect. It uses microwave pulses to generate uncomfortably high noise levels in human skulls. MEDUSA is developed by WaveBand Corporation (Sierra Nevada Corporation bought waveband in 2005)]]. [1]

results.title: DE Weapons & Microwaves – DRONE DELIVERY OF CBNRECy – DEW ...
excerpts: In 2003 WaveBand Corporation received a contract from the U.S. Navy to design a microwave weapon for military crowd control. According to New Scientist, the project transitioned to Sierra Nevada Corporation in 2008.

results.title: Company Overview - Sierra Nevada Corporation | SNC
excerpts:
Known and respected for our mission and execution focus, agility, and disruptive and rapid innovation, we provide leading edge technologies and transformative solutions to support our nation's most critical security needs.

SNC's talented and passionate teams of engineers and dedicated professionals safeguard our freedom and inspire the next generation to make a lasting impact on humanity through technology and imagination.

About SNC

## Leading the Way

SNC's commitment to inquisitive leadership means helping to develop an enterprise-wide mindset of advancement. Our leadership believes a dynamic team environment leads to innovative advancements in technologies, business practices and most importantly to the personal development of our employees.

Meet Our Leadership Team

[](https://vimeo.com/738437694 "Sierra Nevada Corporation Highlight Video")

## A History Of Success
Through our commitment to performance and teaming with like-minded companies interested in discovery and innovation, we have grown a company dedicated to success and complete customer satisfaction.

## Business Areas

Our tightly-knit business areas are recognized as industry leaders and work together to deliver a suite of capabilities that meet the most challenging client requirements.

### ISR, Aviation  
& Security (IAS)

A leading prime manned and unmanned aircraft systems integrator for innovative high-performance ISR systems, aircraft modification, and cybersecurity, specializing in complete end-to-end design, modification, integration, test and certification.

### Mission Solutions  
& Technologies (MST)

Bringing together technology and world-class integration services to provide affordable, high-impact solutions in the areas of C4ISR, customizable multi-mission solutions, electronic warfare, cyber, navigation and landing systems, key management systems and big data management.
Business Areas

## Mission, Vision & Values

It’s our mission to deliver innovative, open architecture technology solutions that support and protect our customers, wherever their missions take them — air, land, sea, cyber and space.

Mission, Vision & Values

## Our Commitment to Quality

Sierra Nevada Company is committed to meet our customers’ expectations by delivering value using efficient, defined processes, and the continuous improvement of these processes, that translates requirements into cost-effective products and services delivered on time and with the quality required by our customers.

## Social Impact

Our mission and pay-it-forward culture are strengthened by the efforts of the Ozmen Foundation, corporate donations and employee volunteerism to drive innovation, fuel entrepreneurship and make a difference in our local, national and global communities.

Our Impact

## Awards & Recognition

results.title: MEDUSA (weapon) — Grokipedia
excerpts: The MEDUSA program, developed under U.S. Navy funding by WaveBand Corporation and later acquired by Sierra Nevada Corporation, was discontinued in 2008 following initial prototype evaluations.

results.title: WaveBand Corporation - by ENDEAVOR MADNESS
excerpts: In May 2005, WaveBand was acquired by Sierra Nevada Corporation for an undisclosed amount. Sadovnik and his team became part of SNC’s broader portfolio, which by then already included UAV landing systems, electronic warfare and jamming, secure communications, and surveillance aircraft modifications.

results.title: MEDUSA (weapon) - Wikipedia
excerpts: Although the initial Navy evaluation of MEDUSA was positive, Sierra Nevada Corporation has discontinued the project, possibly because it may have shown to permanently damage human brain tissue (Hambling, 2008).

results.title: Mob Excess Deterrent Using Silent Audio - Wikispooks
excerpts: Dr. Lev Sadovnik of the Sierra Nevada Corporation who works on the system has stated there are health risks. The biggest issue from the microwave weapon is not the radiation. It's the risk of brain damage from the high-intensity shockwave created by the microwave pulse. [1]
